name: lienwolf
description: Borrower-intent intelligence platform for private & hard money real estate lenders

scripts.worker:dev: npm run build && wrangler dev --config worker/wrangler.toml
scripts.db:migrate: wrangler d1 migrations apply lienwolf-db --config worker/wrangler.toml --remote
scripts.db:migrate:local: wrangler d1 migrations apply lienwolf-db --config worker/wrangler.toml
scripts.db:seed: wrangler d1 execute lienwolf-db --config worker/wrangler.toml --file db/seed.sql --remote
scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler deploy --config worker/wrangler.toml
